=== INFO  1981-10-24.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Recreation Building, Penns State Univ.
Pennsylvania
October 24, 1981

123 mins  audience recording
LB 0290  obtained this on reel orginally a lonnnng time ago so it must be the original. I do not have the other recording anyway

Gotta Serve Somebody
I Believe In You
Like A Rolling Stone
I Want You
Man Gave Names To All The Animals
Maggie's Farm
Girl Of The North Country
Ballad Of A Thin Man
In The Summertime
All Along The Watchtower
Forever Young
Gamblin' Man (?Trad)
The Times They Are A-Changin'
A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
It's All In The Game (Sigman/Dawes)
Slow Train
Solid Rock
Just Like A Woman
Heart Of Mine
When You Gonna Wake Up ?
In The Garden
          *
Blowin' In The Wind
It Ain't Me, Babe
Knockin' On Heaven's Door


Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Fred Tackett (guitar), Steve Ripley (guitar), Al Kooper (keyboards), Tim Drummond (bass), Jim Keltner (drums), Arthur Rosato (drums), Clydie King, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (background vocals).
12 Clydie King, Regina Havis, Madelyn Quebec (vocals).
11, 13, 23, 24 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
15 Bob Dylan & Clydie King (shared vocal).
23 Bob Dylan solo (vocal & guitar).
